web-utils demos

Media Engine

Headless image, video, and audio viewer using media-engine.js.

Open Media Engine demo

Virtualization Engine

Headless list and grid virtualization using virtualization-engine.js.

Open Virtualization Engine demo

Toast Engine

Headless toast/notification queue, lifecycle, and positioning using toast-engine.js.

Open Toast Engine demo

Datetime Engine

Headless date/time picker: calendar-grid generation, single/range selection, hover preview, time, and constraints using datetime-engine.js.

Open Datetime Engine demo

Color Engine

Headless color math: color-space conversion, parsing/serialization, WCAG contrast, accessible-color adjustment, palette/harmony, and perceptual gradients using color-engine.js.

Open Color Engine demo

Image Cropper Engine

Headless image crop + transform for uploads (avatars, covers): frame an image with pan/zoom/rotate/flip behind a fixed crop window, with the coverage invariant and exact output geometry, using image-cropper-engine.js (+ image-cropper-engine-export.js).

Open Image Cropper Engine demo

Drag-and-Drop Engine (File Intake)

Headless file intake: accept files via drag-drop, paste, and a file-picker (with folder traversal), validate them against consumer rules, emit drag-state + the accepted/rejected collection with previews, using drag-n-drop-engine.js. Intake only — uploading stays the app's job.

Open Drag-and-Drop Engine demo

Sortable Engine (drag to reorder)

Headless drag-to-reorder: reorder items within a list or move them between connected kanban columns by pointer-drag or keyboard, with drop-index math, cross-list movement, drag handles, and auto-scroll, using sortable-engine.js. Emits the key order + drag-state; the consumer renders the lists, the lifted item, and the gap.

Open Sortable Engine demo

Selection Engine (marquee multi-select)

Headless multi-selection: click, shift-range, ctrl/⌘-toggle, select-all, and rubber-band marquee selection with cached-geometry hit-testing (no per-move getBoundingClientRect), delta output, an optional spatial index, and auto-scroll across off-screen items, using selection-engine.js. Composes with virtualization-engine for huge lists. Emits the selected key set + deltas + marquee rect; the consumer renders the tiles, the selected state, and the box.

Open Selection Engine demo

Hotkey Engine (keyboard shortcuts)

Headless keyboard-shortcut engine: register chords (⌘⇧P) and Vim-style key sequences (g g, g i) bound to handlers, with scopes/contexts, a typing-guard (bare letter shortcuts don't fire while typing in an input), conflict resolution, and cross-platform mod (⌘ on Mac ⇄ Ctrl elsewhere), using hotkey-engine.js. The engine listens + matches + fires; it emits the registered bindings and live matching state. The consumer renders the palette, modal, cheatsheet, and the pending-sequence indicator.

Open Hotkey Engine demo
